src: A plush chubby unicorn cat with a rainbow-colored body. It has an orange top, yellow and light green bottom, horn, embroidered eyes, small mouth, pinkish-purple paws, and pointed ears with black inner details.
edit: A marble statue of a mythical creature, carved from white and gray marble with soft gradients. Details like ears and eyes are subtly shaded. The statue balances artistry and whimsy.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is on a light wooden table, tilted left, casting a shadow. Nearby are a black chair and part of a desk in a well-lit office or study area.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is on a dark countertop, angled slightly right, beside a glass jug and a partially visible blue cutting board, with small items like a cup nearby, suggesting a kitchen space.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: the object is placed on a light gray windowsill facing forward, with a view of a green lawn and pathway outside glass panes.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: the object is on top of a box, directly facing forward, with the edge of a white cardboard box visible beneath it, adjacent black round object enhances the contrast.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object rests on a bicycle handle, balanced between brake handles and a bicycle light, with wires around the handlebar, indicating an indoor storage.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is on a light wooden table, slightly tilted left, casting a shadow. Nearby are a black chair and part of a desk in the background, in a well-lit office or study area.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: the object is on a dark countertop, angled to the right, beside a large glass jug and a blue cutting board, with a cup nearby.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is on a windowsill, facing forward, with a view of a green lawn and pathway outside. The sill is light gray, alongside glass panes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: the object is on top of a box, facing forward, with a white cardboard box and a black round object nearby enhancing contrast.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object rests on a bicycle handlebar, between brake handles and a bike light, with wires around the handlebar, in an indoor storage or garage location.
